offers.title: 5% cashback on Amazon
offers.description: Extra cashback on Amazon India spends with ICICI Amazon Pay credit card.
offers.termsSummary: Valid on Amazon.in. Cap ₹250 per billing cycle.

offers.title: 10% instant discount on Flipkart
offers.description: Instant discount on Flipkart with Axis Flipkart credit card.
offers.termsSummary: Min transaction ₹2,500. Max discount ₹500 per month.

offers.title: 15% Swiggy cashback
offers.description: Cashback on Swiggy food orders with HDFC Regalia Gold.
offers.termsSummary: Valid on Swiggy app. Cap ₹150 per statement cycle.

offers.title: HDFC Bank shopping festival
offers.description: Bank-wide offer on select shopping merchants for HDFC cardholders.
offers.termsSummary: Participating merchants. Cap ₹1,000 per offer period.
